results.title: India's predicted 11 for 1st T20I vs Ireland: Shreyas Iyer to lead, Tilak Varma vice-captain, Will Vaibhav Sooryavanshi play at Belfast?
results.description: The two match T20I series between India and Ireland kicks off on Friday, June 26, at Belfast. The inaugural fixture is set to commence at 6:00 PM IST.

results.title: PNB Signs MoU with MCD to Enable Digital Payments via BBPS in Delhi
results.description: Punjab National Bank has signed an MoU with the Municipal Corporation of Delhi to enable seamless digital payment collections through BBPS, strengthening the city’s digital governance and payment ecosystem.

results.title: Advit Jewels IPO Last Day: GMP At 38%, Issue Subscribed 63x So Far; Should You Apply? Know Price, Recommendation
results.description: Advit Jewels IPO GMP: Unlisted shares of Advit Jewels trade at Rs 190 apiece in the grey market, which is 37.6% grey market premium over the upper IPO price of Rs 138.

results.title: ‘Obsession’ OTT Release Date: When and Where To Stream Curry Barker and Inde Navarrette’s Horror Blockbuster Online
results.description: Curry Barker's horror sensation 'Obsession,' starring Inde Navarrette, debuts on PVOD June 30, 2026. After a sensational theatrical run, grossing over USD 334 million worldwide, the critically acclaimed film is now available digitally. Navarrette's performance has earned widespread praise.
